==Pokémon==

===Befriended===
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=N
|pkmn=Alomomola (×2)
|type1=Water
|img=N Alomomola.png
|cap=N's Alomomola
|epnum=BW110
|epname=The Name's N!
|desc=N called upon these two {{p|Alomomola}} to help him heal [[Ash's Pikachu]] after it was paralyzed by [[James's Amoonguss]]' {{m|Stun Spore}} in battle.

Alomomola's only known move is {{m|Refresh}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=N
|pkmn=Braviary
|gender=male
|type1=Normal
|type2=Flying
|img=N Braviary.png
|epnum=BW114
|epname=Saving Braviary!
|vajp=Kensuke Satō
|vaen=Tom Wayland
|desc=N met this {{p|Braviary}} after freeing him from the clutches of [[Schwarz and Weiss]]. Although he was taken to a Pokémon Center to be healed from an earlier fall, Braviary was quickly found by Schwarz and Weiss by a tracer they had secretly put on him. Later, when Ash was fighting a losing battle against Weiss's {{p|Zangoose}}, Braviary stepped in and defeated it with a Wing Attack. Afterward, Braviary was let back into the wild.

Braviary's only known move is {{m|Wing Attack}}.}}

|img=N Pidove.png
|epnum=BW118
|epname=Secrets From Out of the Fog!
|vaen=Erica Schroeder
|desc=This {{p|Pidove}} was shown to be a friend of N, as when he got to his childhood home, it showed affection to him.

None of Pidove's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=N
|pkmn=Sawsbuck
|type1=Normal
|type2=Grass
|img=N Sawsbuck.png
|epnum=BW120
|epname=Ash and N: A Clash of Ideals!
|vaen=Jason Griffith
|desc=This wild {{p|Sawsbuck}} took N to the White Ruins sometime before the Light Stone activated which caused an eruption. N had Sawsbuck stay behind in order to prevent it from getting hurt by Team Plasma while he continued to the White Ruins on his own.
